nl_query: What is the average number of preparers per approved answer key?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT faculty_cache_id)) AS avg_preparers_per_ak
FROM   answer_key_preparer
JOIN   answer_key ON answer_key.id = answer_key_preparer.answer_key_id
WHERE  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY ak.id;
